title: Second headset connected with the mobile app
scenario: Second headset connected to Poly Studio Mobile app while first is registered on Lens tenant displays correctly on Inventory, Device User, Mobile Profile, and Device Profile pages with accurate device data
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app on the mobile device.
2. Ensure a first headset is already registered on the Lens tenant and connected to the app.
3. Navigate to the Home screen and verify the first headset is displayed.
4. Pair and connect a second headset to the mobile device via Bluetooth.
5. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app and confirm the second headset appears on the Home screen.
6. Navigate to the Inventory page (via Account or Settings menu).
7. Verify the second headset appears on the Inventory page with accurate data: name, version, private IP address, status, serial number, and date.
8. Navigate to the Device User / Mobile User page.
9. Verify the second headset appears with accurate data: name, version, private IP address, status, serial number, and date.
10. Navigate to the Mobile Profile page.
11. Verify the second headset appears with accurate data: name, version, private IP address, status, serial number, and date.
12. Navigate to the Device Profile page.
13. Verify the second headset appears with accurate data: name, version, private IP address, status, serial number, and date.
expected: The second headset appears correctly on the Inventory page, Device User/Mobile User page, Mobile Profile page, and Device Profile page with accurate data including name, version, private IP address, status, serial number, and date.
